patterns.pattern: ^(\w+) gestures at (.+), whose eyes begin to fill with bloodlust and all thoughts of defense flee from \w+\.$
^Warmth spreads up your arm as (you) gesture at (.+), filling \w+ with foolish bloodlust\.$
^(\w+) points? an imperious finger at (.+)\. \w+ flesh blackens and sloughs off\.$
^(\w+) points? an imperious finger at (.+)\. Blood spurts out of .+'s eyes, ears, nose, and mouth\.$
^(You) call upon the spirit of Korkma, sending \w+ many-tentacled form to torment (.+)\.$
^(\w+) grows still for a moment, then flings \w+ arms out toward (.+)\. You catch a glimpse of writhing tentacles flying towards .+ as \w+ begins to flee in terror\.$
^(\w+) points? an imperious finger at (.+) and \w+ translucent shield fades away\.$
^(You) call upon the spirit of Vurus and form an ethereal dagger in your hand. Dashing behind the oblivious form of (.+), you plant the dagger in \w+ back\.$
^(\w+) holds one hand out to \w+ side\. As an ethereal dagger appears there, \w+ dashes behind the oblivious form of (.+) and plants the dagger in \w+ back\.$
^(You) call upon the spirit of Vurus and form an ethereal dagger in your hand. Dashing behind (.+), you plant the dagger in \w+ back\.$
^(\w+) holds one hand out to \w+ side\. As an ethereal dagger appears there, \w+ dashes behind (.+) and plants the dagger in \w+ back\.$
^(You) call upon the spirit of Vurus and form an ethereal dagger in your hand\. You dash behind (.+), but are only able to strike a glancing blow as \w+ dodges aside\.$
^(\w+) holds one hand out to \w+ side\. As an ethereal dagger appears there, \w+ dashes behind (.+) but is only able to deliver a glancing blow\.$
^(\w+) points? an imperious finger at (.+) and blood begins to flow from \w+ pores\.$
^A terrible cold fills your chest, constricting your lungs\. (You)r mouth falls open and an unearthly, terrible roar emanates forth at (.+)\.$
^The mouth of (\w+) falls open as \w+ eyes grow unfocused, and \w+ directs a terrible, unearthly roar at (.+)\.$
